metadata.title: Build the Faraday Cage: Copper's Skin Depth with Claude
metadata.note: CLI spine: B00 INTRO (ClaudeComposerAsk cold open) · B01 PROBLEM · B02 ASK · B03 CODE (ClaudeCodeBeat, real script) · B04 OUTPUT (Manim: skin depth log-log + MRI markers) · B05 CHANGE (ClaudeComposerAsk, material comparison) · B06 OUTPUT (Manim: 3 materials) · B07 SUMMARY · B08 NEXT STEPS (handoff 'Your turn.') · B09 OUTRO (ClaudeTitleOutro @NikBearBrown). One required revision (B05→B06).

source_of_truth: beat_sheet.json — edit the sheet, not this file
